generic_rules: Place AGREE contracts within `annex agree { ... };` blocks.
Component type contracts should use component type scope; implementation contracts should use implementation scope.
Use case-provided thresholds and visible feature names in contracts.
Relate visible outputs to visible inputs in guarantees.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use `eq name : type = expression;` to define equations.
Use `assume "label": expression;` and `guarantee "label": expression;` for assumptions and guarantees.
anti_patterns: Do not use implementation-only subcomponent paths in component type annexes.
Do not encode AADL timing properties as AGREE expressions unless the model exposes explicit typed ports or constants.
